property.name: canSave
property.label: Can save
property.description: Whether save operation is allowed in given state

property.name: consoleVerbosityStr
property.label: Console verbosity string
property.description: Console verbosity string, only for client app

property.name: customSceneObjectClasses
property.label: Custom scene object classes
property.description: List of app custom scene object classes

property.name: dialogVerbosityStr
property.label: Dialog verbosity string
property.description: Dialog verbosity string, only for client app

property.name: execUnsafeExt
property.label: Execute unsafe extended
property.description: Execute unsafe for code triggered externally

property.name: headlessMode
property.label: Headless mode
property.description: Headless mode (0: not headless, 1: GUI suppressed, 2: headless library)

property.name: notifyDeprecated
property.label: Notify deprecated
property.description: Notify deprecated API (0: off, 1: light, 2: full)

property.name: statusbarVerbosityStr
property.label: Statusbar verbosity string
property.description: Statusbar verbosity string, only for client app

property.name: perspective
property.label: Perspective
property.description: Perspective projection mode, otherwise orthogonal projection mode

property.name: mujoco.jointProxyHandle
property.label: Joint proxy
property.description: Handle of the joint proxy, MuJoCo only

property.name: intrinsicError
property.label: Intrinsic error
property.description: Intrinsic error, generated by some physics engines

property.name: averageJointForce
property.label: Average force
property.description: Force applied on average (in a simulation step)

property.name: calcVelocity
property.label: Velocity
property.description: Calculated joint linear or angular velocity

property.name: cyclic
property.label: Cyclic
property.description: Cyclic revolute joint, has no limits

property.name: dependencyMaster
property.label: Dependency master
property.description: Handle of master joint (in a dependency relationship)

property.name: dependencyMasterHandle
property.label: Dependency master
property.description: Handle of master joint (in a dependency relationship)

property.name: dynCtrlMode
property.label: Control mode
property.description: Joint control mode, when in dynamic mode

property.name: intrinsicError
property.label: Intrinsic error
property.description: Intrinsic error, generated by some physics engines

property.name: intrinsicPose
property.label: Intrinsic pose
property.description: Intrinsic pose (includes a possible intrinsic error)

property.name: povray.castShadows
property.label: POV-Ray: cast shadows
property.description: Light casts shadows (with the POV-Ray renderer plugin)

property.name: local
property.label: Local
property.description: Coordinates are local to the marker's reference frame

property.name: convex
property.label: Convex
property.description: Whether mesh is convex or not

property.name: maxPointsInCell
property.label: Max. points in cell
property.description: Maximum number of points in an oc-tree cell/voxel

property.name: pointDisplayFraction
property.label: Display fraction
property.description: Fraction of points to be displayed in an oc-tree cell/voxel

property.name: closeThreshold
property.label: Close threshold
property.description: Close threshold: if a detection occures below that threshold, it is not registered. 0.0 to disable

property.name: volume_angle
property.label: Angles
property.description: Angle and inside gap for disk- and cone-type volumes

property.name: volume_closeEdges
property.label: Volume close edges
property.description: List of segments (defined by pairs of end-point coordinates) visualizing the close threshold of the volume

property.name: volume_edges
property.label: Volume edges
property.description: List of segments (defined by pairs of end-point coordinates) visualizing the volume

property.name: volume_faces
property.label: Faces
property.description: Number of faces (near and far) for cylinder-, disk- and pyramid-type volumes

property.name: volume_radius
property.label: Radius
property.description: Radius for cylinder-, disk- and cone-type volumes

property.name: volume_subdivisions
property.label: Subdivisions
property.description: Number of subdivisions (near and far) for cone-type volumes

property.name: volume_xSize
property.label: X-sizes
property.description: X-size (near and far) for pyramid-type volumes

property.name: volume_ySize
property.label: Y-sizes
property.description: Y-size (near and far) for pyramid-type volumes

property.name: dynamicsEngine
property.label: Dynamics engine
property.description: Selected dynamics engine index and version

property.name: finalSaveRequest
property.label: Final save
property.description: Lock scene and models after next scene save operation

property.name: orphans
property.label: Orphan objects
property.description: Handles of all orphan scene objects

property.name: pauseSimulationAtTime
property.label: Pause simulation at time
property.description: Pause simulation when simulation time exceeds a threshold

property.name: removeNewObjectsAtEnd
property.label: Remove new objects
property.description: Remove new scene objects at simulation end

property.name: saveCalculationStructs
property.label: Save calculation structures
property.description: Save operation also saves existing calculation structures

property.name: timeToPause
property.label: Simulation pause time
property.description: Time at which simulation should pause

property.name: calcLinearVelocity
property.label: Linear velocity
property.description: Calculated scene object linear velocity vector

property.name: cannotDelete
property.label: Cannot delete
property.description: Scene object cannot be deleted while simulation is not running

property.name: cannotDeleteInSim
property.label: Cannot delete during simulation
property.description: Scene object cannot be deleted while simulation is running

property.name: depthInvisible
property.label: Depth pass invisible
property.description: Scene object is invisible for the depth buffer during a click operation

property.name: hideFromModelBB
property.label: Hide from model bounding box
property.description: Scene object is not part of a parent model's bounding box

property.name: ignoreViewFitting
property.label: Ignore view fitting
property.description: View fitting is ignored for this scene object

property.name: model.notDynamic
property.label: Model not dynamic
property.description: Model is not dynamic, i.e. model is static

property.name: model.notInParentBB
property.label: Model invisible to other model's bounding boxes
property.description: Model is invisible to other model's bounding boxes

property.name: modelBase
property.label: Model base
property.description: Model base flag, indicates the scene object is the base of a model

property.name: modelNotDynamic
property.label: Model not dynamic
property.description: Model is not dynamic, i.e. model is static

property.name: modelNotInParentBB
property.label: Model invisible to other model's bounding boxes
property.description: Model is invisible to other model's bounding boxes

property.name: mov.rotInSim
property.label: Rotation enabled during simulation
property.description: Rotation enabled when simulation is running

property.name: mov.rotNoSim
property.label: Rotation enabled
property.description: Rotation enabled when simulation is not running

property.name: mov.translInSim
property.label: Translation enabled during simulation
property.description: Translation enabled when simulation is running

property.name: mov.translNoSim
property.label: Translation enabled
property.description: Translation enabled when simulation is not running

property.name: movRotInSim
property.label: Rotation enabled during simulation
property.description: Rotation enabled when simulation is running

property.name: movRotNoSim
property.label: Rotation enabled
property.description: Rotation enabled when simulation is not running

property.name: movTranslInSim
property.label: Translation enabled during simulation
property.description: Translation enabled when simulation is running

property.name: movTranslNoSim
property.label: Translation enabled
property.description: Translation enabled when simulation is not running

property.name: selectInvisible
property.label: Select invisible
property.description: Scene object is invisible during a selection operation

property.name: selectModel
property.label: Select model instead
property.description: Selecting the scene object instead selects the parent model

property.name: visible
property.label: Visible
property.description: Whether the scene object is currently visible

property.name: applyColor.diffuse
property.label: Apply diffuse color
property.description: Applies the diffuse color component to all contained meshes

property.name: applyColor.emission
property.label: Apply emission color
property.description: Applies the emission color component to all contained meshes

property.name: applyColor.specular
property.label: Apply specular color
property.description: Applies the specular color component to all contained meshes

property.name: applyColor.transparency
property.label: Apply transparency
property.description: Applies transparency to all contained meshes

property.name: applyCulling
property.label: Apply culling
property.description: Enables/disables culling for all contained meshes

property.name: applyShadingAngle
property.label: Apply shading
property.description: Applies a shading angle to all contained meshes

property.name: applyShowEdges
property.label: Apply edges
property.description: Enables/disables edges for all contained meshes

property.name: centerOfMass
property.label: Center of mass
property.description: Center of mass, relative to the shape's reference frame

property.name: compound
property.label: Compound
property.description: Whether the shape is a compound

property.name: compoundColors.diffuse
property.label: Diffuse color data
property.description: Diffuse color from all compound elements

property.name: compoundColors.emission
property.label: Emission color data
property.description: Emission color from all compound elements

property.name: compoundColors.specular
property.label: Specular color data
property.description: Specular color from all compound elements

property.name: compoundColors.transparency
property.label: Transparency data
property.description: Transparency value from all compound elements

property.name: compoundCullings
property.label: Culling data
property.description: Backface culling state from all compound elements

property.name: compoundEdges
property.label: Edge visibility data
property.description: Edge visibility from all compound elements

property.name: compoundShadingAngles
property.label: Shading angle data
property.description: Shading angle state from all compound elements

property.name: compoundWireframe
property.label: Wireframe data
property.description: Wireframe state from all compound elements

property.name: convex
property.label: Convex
property.description: Whether the shape's components are all convex or not

property.name: dynAngularVelocity
property.label: Rotational velocity
property.description: Rotational velocity, as transmitted by the physics engine

property.name: dynLinearVelocity
property.label: Linear velocity
property.description: Linear velocity, as transmitted by the physics engine

property.name: dynamic
property.label: Dynamic
property.description: Shape is dynamic, i.e. not static

property.name: flipFaces
property.label: Flip faces
property.description: Flips faces of all contained meshes

property.name: inertia
property.label: Inertia tensor
property.description: Inertia tensor, relative to the shape's reference frame

property.name: inertiaMatrix
property.label: Inertia matrix
property.description: Inertia matrix, relative to the shape's reference frame

property.name: kinematic
property.label: Kinematic
property.description: Special flag mainly used for MuJoCo static shapes that move and need to transmit a friction

property.name: pmiQuaternion
property.label: Quaternion of the principal moment of inertia
property.description: Quaternion of the principal moment of inertia, relative to the shape's reference frame

property.name: primitive
property.label: Primitive
property.description: Whether the shape's components are all primitives

property.name: principalMomentOfInertia
property.label: Principal moment of inertia
property.description: Principal moment of inertia, relative to pmiQuaternion

property.name: respondable
property.label: Respondable
property.description: Shape will transmit a collision force

property.name: setToDynamicWithParent
property.label: Set to dynamic if gets parent
property.description: Shape will be made dynamic if it receives a parent

property.name: perspective
property.label: Perspective
property.description: Perspective projection mode, otherwise orthogonal projection mode

property.name: povray.blurDistance
property.label: POV-Ray: blur distance
property.description: Focal blur distance (with the POV-Ray renderer plugin)

property.name: povray.blurSamples
property.label: POV-Ray: blur samples
property.description: Focal blur samples (with the POV-Ray renderer plugin)

property.name: povray.focalBlur
property.label: POV-Ray: focal blur
property.description: Focal blur (with the POV-Ray renderer plugin)
